page: Microsoft Azure NV12ads_V710_v5 is a virtualized server instance belonging to the NVadsV710v5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This instance features an x86_64 AMD processor with 12 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 5.33 GB per vCPU. A key architectural feature is the inclusion of a fractional GPU, specifically a 0.5 partition of an AMD V710 GPU, which provides 11 GB of dedicated video RAM.

For local data requirements, the instance is equipped with 825 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. In terms of networking, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, which requires users to configure external access separately. A notable tradeoff of this configuration is the fractional GPU allocation, which offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads but limits the raw compute power compared to full-GPU instances.

The NV12ads_V710_v5 is designed for workloads that require moderate GPU acceleration without the cost overhead of a dedicated full GPU. This resource density makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for tasks such as virtual desktop infrastructure, hardware-accelerated rendering, entry-level machine learning inference, and general-purpose development environments that utilize GPU APIs.
description: Microsoft Azure NV12ads_V710_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the NVadsV710v5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs, 64.0 GB of system memory, and 825 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. The instance is distinguished by its fractional GPU configuration, providing a 0.5 partition of an AMD V710 GPU with 11 GB of VRAM. This fractional allocation offers a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring moderate GPU acceleration without the expense of a full GPU. However, users must note that no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included. This server is suited for virtual desktop hosting, moderate 3D rendering, and entry-level machine learning inference.

tagline: An x86_64 virtual instance featuring dedicated AMD vCPUs, local storage, and a fractional GPU with eleven gigabytes of video memory.

64.0 GB system memory with 5.33 GB per core
